metadata.description: Apple Human Interface Guidelines for AI coding agents — 14 skills, a Model Context Protocol server, and a universal HIG compliance auditor. Snapshot Feb 2025.

plugins.name: apple-hig-skills
plugins.description: 14 Apple HIG skills (foundations, platforms, patterns, inputs, technologies, and 8 component categories) plus an MCP server (hig_list_skills / hig_lookup / hig_audit) and a Bun-based CLI auditor that detects 349 HIG patterns across SwiftUI, UIKit, React, Vue, Svelte, Angular, Compose, Flutter, and React Native.
